revision.text:
[[ja:円満寺 (奈良市)]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Enman-ji Nara.jpg|prefecture={{ill|Nara|qid=Q169134|1=Nara (city)}}|coordinates={{Coord|34.641972|N|135.829806|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} | native_name = {{ruby|圓満寺|えんまんじ}} | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} | image = [[File:Enmanji nara jp.jpg|frameless]] | address = {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}} {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}} {{ill|Yamamachi|ja|山町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamachi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 109 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 38 | 緯度秒 = 31.1 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 | 経度分 = 49 | 経度秒 = 47.3 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Nara city | 山号 = | 宗旨 = {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|qid=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism|1=Shingon Buddhism}} | 宗派 = | 寺格 = | 本尊 = {{ill|Seimen Kongō|ja|青面金剛|1=Shōmen Kongō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seimen Kongō|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmen Kongō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11662826}} | 創建年 = | 開基 = | 中興年 = | 中興 = | 正式名 = | 別称 = {{ill|Obikake Kōshin-dō|ja|帯解Kōshin-dō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Obikake Kōshin-dō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{ill|Yamamura Bishamondō|ja|山村毘沙門堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamura Bishamondō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 円満寺 (奈良市)|1=Enman-ji (Nara)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394813}} | 札所等 = {{ill|Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|ja|大和北部八十八ヶ所霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|1=Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22120745}} 69番札所 | 文化財 = {{ill|Sangaku|en|Sangaku|qid=Q2569069|lt=Sangaku|1=Sangaku}} (奈良市指定文化財) }} '''Enmanji''' (円満寺) is a temple located in Yamamachi, Nara City, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}. Its principal image is {{ill|Seimen Kongō|ja|青面金剛|1=Shōmen Kongō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seimen Kongō|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmen Kongō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11662826}}, and it is temple number 69 in the {{ill|Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|ja|大和北部八十八ヶ所霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|1=Yamato Northern 88 Sacred Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22120745}}. The temple office also functions as the Shimoyamamachi Community Center. == Cultural Properties == [[File:Sangaku at Enmanji.jpg|thumb|300px|Sangaku]] === Nara City Designated Tangible Folk Cultural Property === * {{ill|Sangaku|en|Sangaku|qid=Q2569069|lt=Sangaku|1=Sangaku}} (one surface) – designated on March 2, Heisei 6 (1994). Donated by Genjirō in Tenpō 15 (1844) (the restored inscription is displayed). == Access == * A 10-minute walk from the {{ill|Sakurai Line|en|Sakurai Line|qid=Q865801|lt=JR Sakurai Line|1=Sakurai Line}}, from {{ill|Obitoke Station|en|Obitoke Station|qid=Q3702696|lt=Obikake Station|1=Obitoke Station}}. == Footnotes == == See Also == * {{ill|Yasaka Shrine (Nara City's Yamamachi)|ja|八坂神社 (奈良市山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka Shrine (Nara City's Yamamachi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located on the same precinct) * {{ill|Sangaku|en|Sangaku|qid=Q2569069|lt=Sangaku|1=Sangaku}} == External Links == * [https://ja.foursquare.com/v/%E5%86%86%E6%BA%80%E5%AF%BA/52ec6817498e1fb146d38de5 円満寺] - FOURSQUARE * [http://manabunara.jp/contents_detail.php?frmId=3585 こんな講座ありました（発見！南部の宝）] - 奈良市生涯学習財団 * [http://www.stomo.jp/3k_kiji/3k121020.html 古都に残る「算額」 最中の文様にも歴史] - 奈良まほろばソムリエの会 {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{pref-stub-奈良県}} {{Buddhism-stub}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|円満寺 (奈良市)|version=74476996|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:円満寺 (奈良市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11394813}} [[Category:Buddhist temples in Nara, Nara]] [[Category:Kōshin]] [[Category:Sangaku]] [[Category:Vaiśravaṇa]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Yamato North 88 Temple Pilgrimage]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
